# ElevenLabs -- Setup, TTS, Streaming & Voice Settings Examples

> Client initialization, text-to-speech conversion, streaming, timestamps, voice settings, and error handling. See [SKILL.md](../SKILL.md) for core patterns.

**Related examples:**

- [voices.md](voices.md) -- Voice search, cloning, speech-to-speech
- [websocket.md](websocket.md) -- WebSocket input streaming, conversational AI

---

## Basic Client Setup

```typescript
// lib/elevenlabs.ts
import { ElevenLabsClient } from "@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js";

// Reads ELEVENLABS_API_KEY from env automatically
const client = new ElevenLabsClient();

export { client };
```

---

## Production Configuration

```typescript
// lib/elevenlabs.ts
import { ElevenLabsClient } from "@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js";

const TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 60;
const MAX_RETRIES = 3;

const client = new ElevenLabsClient({
  apiKey: process.env.ELEVENLABS_API_KEY,
  timeoutInSeconds: TIMEOUT_SECONDS,
  maxRetries: MAX_RETRIES,
});

export { client };
```

---

## Text-to-Speech: Convert to File

```typescript
import { createWriteStream } from "node:fs";
import { Readable } from "node:stream";
import { client } from "./lib/elevenlabs.js";

const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb"; // George

const audio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "Welcome to the application. This audio is generated by ElevenLabs.",
  modelId: "eleven_multilingual_v2",
  outputFormat: "mp3_44100_128",
});

// Pipe ReadableStream to file
const readable = Readable.fromWeb(audio);
const fileStream = createWriteStream("output.mp3");
readable.pipe(fileStream);

await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
  fileStream.on("finish", resolve);
  fileStream.on("error", reject);
});
```

---

## Text-to-Speech: Convert to Buffer

```typescript
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";

const audio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "This will be collected into a buffer.",
  modelId: "eleven_flash_v2_5",
  outputFormat: "mp3_44100_128",
});

// Collect stream into Buffer
const chunks: Uint8Array[] = [];
for await (const chunk of audio) {
  chunks.push(chunk);
}
const audioBuffer = Buffer.concat(chunks);
```

---

## Text-to-Speech: Stream to HTTP Response

```typescript
// In an HTTP handler (framework-agnostic)
async function handleTtsRequest(
  text: string,
  responseHeaders: (headers: Record<string, string>) => void,
  responseBody: WritableStream<Uint8Array>,
): Promise<void> {
  const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";
  const LATENCY_OPTIMIZATION = 2;

  const audioStream = await client.textToSpeech.stream(VOICE_ID, {
    text,
    modelId: "eleven_flash_v2_5",
    optimizeStreamingLatency: LATENCY_OPTIMIZATION,
    outputFormat: "mp3_44100_128",
  });

  responseHeaders({
    "Content-Type": "audio/mpeg",
    "Transfer-Encoding": "chunked",
  });

  await audioStream.pipeTo(responseBody);
}
```

---

## Text-to-Speech: With Timestamps

```typescript
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";

// Full audio with character-level timing
const result = await client.textToSpeech.convertWithTimestamps(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "Synchronized text highlighting.",
  modelId: "eleven_multilingual_v2",
});

// result.audioBase64 -- complete audio as base64 string
// result.alignment -- character timing data
const { chars, charStartTimesMs, charDurationsMs } = result.alignment;

for (let i = 0; i < chars.length; i++) {
  console.log(
    `"${chars[i]}" at ${charStartTimesMs[i]}ms for ${charDurationsMs[i]}ms`,
  );
}
```

---

## Text-to-Speech: Streaming with Timestamps

```typescript
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";

const stream = await client.textToSpeech.streamWithTimestamps(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "Real-time audio with timing data.",
  modelId: "eleven_flash_v2_5",
});

for await (const chunk of stream) {
  // Each chunk contains audio data AND alignment timing
  if (chunk.audio) {
    // Process audio bytes (base64 or raw depending on format)
  }
  if (chunk.alignment) {
    // Process character timing for text highlighting
    console.log(chunk.alignment.chars, chunk.alignment.charStartTimesMs);
  }
}
```

---

## Voice Settings: Detailed Control

```typescript
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";

// Narration style -- stable, natural
const narrationAudio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "The year was 1984. The world had changed irrevocably.",
  modelId: "eleven_v3",
  voiceSettings: {
    stability: 0.5,
    similarityBoost: 0.75,
    style: 0.0,
    useSpeakerBoost: true,
    speed: 0.9,
  },
});

// Expressive style -- dynamic, emotional
const expressiveAudio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "I can't believe it! This is absolutely incredible!",
  modelId: "eleven_v3",
  voiceSettings: {
    stability: 0.3,
    similarityBoost: 0.8,
    style: 0.5,
    useSpeakerBoost: true,
    speed: 1.1,
  },
});
```

---

## Multi-Part Audio with Consistency

```typescript
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";
const MODEL_ID = "eleven_multilingual_v2";

// Generate first segment
const part1 = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "Chapter one. In the beginning, there was silence.",
  modelId: MODEL_ID,
  nextText: "Then came a sound, faint at first.",
});

// Use previous_request_ids for voice consistency across segments
const part1RequestId = "request-id-from-headers"; // Extract from response

const part2 = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "Then came a sound, faint at first.",
  modelId: MODEL_ID,
  previousText: "Chapter one. In the beginning, there was silence.",
  previousRequestIds: [part1RequestId],
});
```

---

## Pronunciation Dictionary

```typescript
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";
const DICT_ID = "dict_abc123";
const DICT_VERSION = "v_001";

const audio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "The CEO of Acme Corp announced the new API.",
  modelId: "eleven_multilingual_v2",
  pronunciationDictionaryLocators: [
    {
      pronunciationDictionaryId: DICT_ID,
      versionId: DICT_VERSION,
    },
  ],
});
```

---

## Error Handling

```typescript
import {
  ElevenLabsClient,
  ElevenLabsError,
  ElevenLabsTimeoutError,
} from "@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js";

const TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 30;
const MAX_RETRIES = 3;
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";

const client = new ElevenLabsClient({
  timeoutInSeconds: TIMEOUT_SECONDS,
  maxRetries: MAX_RETRIES,
});

async function generateSpeech(text: string): Promise<Buffer | null> {
  try {
    const audio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
      text,
      modelId: "eleven_multilingual_v2",
    });

    const chunks: Uint8Array[] = [];
    for await (const chunk of audio) {
      chunks.push(chunk);
    }
    return Buffer.concat(chunks);
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof ElevenLabsTimeoutError) {
      console.error(
        "Request timed out -- consider increasing timeoutInSeconds",
      );
      return null;
    }

    if (error instanceof ElevenLabsError) {
      console.error(`API error [${error.statusCode}]: ${error.message}`);

      // 422: Invalid parameters (bad voice ID, text too long, invalid model)
      if (error.statusCode === 422) {
        console.error("Validation error:", JSON.stringify(error.body));
        return null;
      }

      // 401: Invalid API key
      if (error.statusCode === 401) {
        throw new Error("Invalid API key. Check ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var.");
      }

      // 429/5xx: SDK already retried and exhausted attempts
      return null;
    }

    // Unknown errors should be re-thrown
    throw error;
  }
}
```

---

## Request Cancellation with AbortController

```typescript
const controller = new AbortController();
const ABORT_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000;
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";

// Cancel after timeout
setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), ABORT_TIMEOUT_MS);

try {
  const audio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(
    VOICE_ID,
    { text: "This may be cancelled.", modelId: "eleven_flash_v2_5" },
    { abortSignal: controller.signal },
  );
} catch (error) {
  if (error instanceof Error && error.name === "AbortError") {
    console.log("Request was cancelled");
  }
}
```

---

## Output Format Selection

```typescript
const VOICE_ID = "JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb";

// High quality MP3 for web playback
const webAudio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "For the browser.",
  modelId: "eleven_v3",
  outputFormat: "mp3_44100_128",
});

// Raw PCM for audio processing pipelines
const rawAudio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "For processing.",
  modelId: "eleven_flash_v2_5",
  outputFormat: "pcm_16000",
});

// μ-law for telephony/IVR
const telephonyAudio = await client.textToSpeech.convert(VOICE_ID, {
  text: "Press one for support.",
  modelId: "eleven_flash_v2_5",
  outputFormat: "ulaw_8000",
});
```
